headline: Uber and Lucid pick Houston as next robotaxi market as battle with Waymo, Tesla heats up
summary: Uber and Lucid are expanding their robotaxi venture, naming Houston as the second planned market for the autonomous ride-hailing service the two companies are building with self-driving startup Nuro.

content.title: Uber and Lucid pick Houston as next robotaxi market as battle with Waymo, Tesla heats up
content.summary: Uber and Lucid are expanding their robotaxi venture, naming Houston as the second planned market for the autonomous ride-hailing service the two companies are building with self-driving startup Nuro.

headline: WeRide and Uber Target Zurich Robotaxi Launch as European Expansion Accelerates
summary: WeRide (NASDAQ:WRD) and Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) plan to introduce commercial robotaxi services in the Greater Zurich Region later this year, extending their autonomous mobility partnership in Europe following a recent deployment announcement in Madrid. The service is expected to launch during 2026, pending approval from Switzerland’s Federal Roads Office (FEDRO).

content.title: WeRide and Uber Target Zurich Robotaxi Launch as European Expansion Accelerates
content.summary: WeRide (NASDAQ:WRD) and Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) plan to introduce commercial robotaxi services in the Greater Zurich Region later this year, extending their autonomous mobility partnership in Europe following a recent deployment announcement in Madrid. The service is expected to launch during 2026, pending approval from Switzerland’s Federal Roads Office (FEDRO).

headline: Uber Robo-Taxis Move Step Closer as Self-Driving War Revs Up
summary: On Wednesday, ride-hailing giant  Uber  EV maker  Lucid  and self-driving technology start-up Nuro announced plans to launch robo-taxis in Houston in 2027.  Uber operates the network, Lucid builds the cars, and Nuro provides the autonomous driving technology.  The move is yet another example that the long-promised era of driverless cars has arrived.

content.title: Uber Robo-Taxis Move Step Closer as Self-Driving War Revs Up
content.summary: On Wednesday, ride-hailing giant  Uber  EV maker  Lucid  and self-driving technology start-up Nuro announced plans to launch robo-taxis in Houston in 2027.  Uber operates the network, Lucid builds the cars, and Nuro provides the autonomous driving technology.  The move is yet another example that the long-promised era of driverless cars has arrived.

headline: Lucid (LCID) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of luxury electric car manufacturer Lucid (NASDAQ:LCID) jumped 7.5% in the afternoon session after the company, along with partners Uber and Nuro, announced plans to launch a robotaxi service in Houston in mid-2027.

headline: LCID Stock Jumps Over 7% — Uber-Lucid-Nuro Partnership Sets Stage For Robotaxis In Houston By 2027
summary: Uber, Nuro, and Lucid Group have officially named Houston as the second major market for their joint autonomous ride-hailing initiative, with commercial services slated to begin in mid-2027.
